hero_sub: One script tag turns any site into a conversation. ZRO Voice talks to your visitors, scrolls and highlights pages, books appointments, captures leads — in 30+ languages, 24/7.
hero_badge: NO CREDIT CARD · LAUNCH IN 2 MIN
prob_h2b: ZRO Voice makes it a conversation.
prob_p1: 97% of visitors leave without saying a word. Forms feel like paperwork. Chatbots feel like quizzes. The only person who could actually answer their question — your salesperson — isn't online at 11pm in São Paulo.
prob_p2: With ZRO Voice, your site talks back.
prob_p3: A visitor lands, sees a pulse, taps it, and gets answers from a voice that knows your product, your pricing, your booking calendar, your FAQ — in their language, on every page, instantly.
prod_1_p: On install we crawl your site, embed every page into a per-tenant vector store, and ground the agent in your real content. No hallucinations. The voice is yours — choose from 60+ presets or clone your own from a 5-second clip.
prod_2_p: When a visitor asks where to book, the agent says let me show you and physically scrolls to the calendar — highlighting, expanding, opening the right tab. Conversation and DOM stay in lockstep.
prod_3_p: Reads intent, captures name and email and context mid-call, books appointments via Cal.com, Calendly, Google Calendar, fires webhooks to your CRM, and drops the full transcript in your dashboard.
how_1_p: Drop one line into the head of your site. Same script tag works on Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, Framer, Squarespace, Next.js, anything that renders HTML.
how_2_p: Our crawler reads every page (sitemap-aware), strips the chrome, embeds the content into a private vector store keyed to your tenant ID. Typical site: 2 minutes. Re-indexes nightly or on webhook.
how_3_p: A floating pill appears bottom-right. Visitor taps, mic permission prompt, then the agent listens. Sub-800ms first reply. Talks. Scrolls. Books. Captures leads.
try_h2: Watch it work on a real site.
try_instruction: Use the floating Talk to ZRO control (bottom-right). Allow the microphone, then ask:
try_q2: Book me a demo for next Tuesday.
dash_1_p: Every call, fully transcribed and searchable. Filter by intent, sentiment, country, page.
dash_2_p: Names, emails, phones, companies. Auto-pushed to your CRM, Slack, or CSV export.
dash_3_p: Country, device, browser, OS, referrer, pages viewed before the call, time-on-call, conversion.
dash_4_p: Agent recognizes a returning visitor and picks up the conversation. Cross-device when they identify themselves.
edge_1_p: Real-time emotion detection routes the agent tone — slows down, lowers pitch, leads with empathy when the visitor sounds frustrated. Picks up energy when excited. Their mood, not yours.
edge_2_p: On every utterance, the agent gets a description of what is actually on screen. Asked about the pricing card visible right now? It answers from what is in front of them, not what was on page-load.
edge_3_p: Clone your founder voice from a short reference clip. Or pick from 50+ studio voices — every one naturally human, none of the robotic TTS of a 2018 chatbot.
edge_4_p: EU data residency, on-prem option, bring your own model keys. Speech audio is GDPR Article 9 special category — most competitors send it to US clouds. We do not have to.
edge_5_p: Every layer of the stack is auditable and swappable — voices, models, languages, hosting region. Your agent is not trapped in someone else API.
edge_6_p: Same account works across the ZRO Lab ecosystem. Single sign-on, single billing, single support. Grow into the family without re-onboarding.
pri_pack_footer: MINUTES NEVER EXPIRE · PACKS STACK ON ANY PLAN · CANCEL ANYTIME
faq_sub: Setup, voices, languages, billing, lead capture, self-hosting — all answered.
faq_q1: Does ZRO Voice support multiple languages?
faq_a1: Yes. 30+ languages out of the box including English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Italian, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Russian, Ukrainian, Turkish, Arabic, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, Mandarin, Cantonese, Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Indonesian, Vietnamese, Thai, Greek, Romanian, Hungarian, Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish. The agent auto-detects the visitor language.
faq_q2: How does the agent learn about my product?
faq_a2: On install we crawl your site (sitemap, then page-by-page) and embed every paragraph into a per-tenant vector store. Updates are picked up automatically on a configurable cadence. You can also paste docs, a help center, or a Notion link.
faq_a3: 50+ voices in the default library, ranging from warm conversational to authoritative narrator. You can clone your own brand voice from a short reference clip — preview and switch voices live from the dashboard.
faq_q4: Does it work on my CMS?
faq_a4: Anywhere you can paste a script tag: Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, Squarespace, Framer, Wix, custom Next.js, React, Vue, Svelte, static HTML, mobile webviews. Native iOS and Android SDKs ship for the apps tier.
faq_q5: Does it work on mobile apps?
faq_a5: Native iOS, Android, and React Native SDKs are on the roadmap. Drop one line into your app, point it at your tenant key, and the same agent runs there with the same voice and knowledge as on web.
faq_q6: What happens if I run out of minutes?
faq_a6: The widget hides itself gracefully on the next page load — no error toasts, no broken UI. All conversations, leads, and analytics stay in your dashboard. Top up with a minute pack or upgrade your plan and the agent comes back instantly.
faq_a7: Real-time to your dashboard, optional email digest, optional Slack notification, CSV export, and webhook out to your CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Attio, Notion, Airtable, Google Sheets).
faq_q8: Does ZRO Voice recognize returning visitors?
faq_a8: Yes. The agent remembers prior conversations on the same browser by default, and across devices when the visitor identifies themselves. You control the retention window per tenant.
faq_a9: Full transcripts, lead capture details, country, device, browser, OS breakdown, time-on-page during call, scroll-to-action conversion, voice quality scores, and per-question intent classification. Free tier shows last 7 days.
faq_a10: Yes — Enterprise tier ships the full gateway as Docker images you run on your own infrastructure (or our EU-hosted dedicated tier). Customer audio never leaves your network. Includes white-label branding, SSO, and a signed support agreement.
cta_sub: Give them someone to talk to.
cta_badge: FREE PLAN · NO CREDIT CARD · LAUNCH IN 2 MIN
ft_tagline: Your website voice. Embeddable agent that talks, scrolls, and books.
